## Summary

Describe the change and why it is useful.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] SQL example
- [ ] Database schema or seed data
- [ ] CI or repository maintenance

## Scope

- [ ] This change is limited to one chapter or one maintenance topic.
- [ ] This change avoids unrelated formatting or restructuring.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the SQL locally, if applicable.
- [ ] I updated documentation, if applicable.
- [ ] I kept the change focused and beginner-friendly.
- [ ] I checked links and related example references, if applicable.
